title: 8-Bit Arcade Game
description: A retro arcade game in the browser with pixel-perfect 8-bit graphics and classic gameplay, built using HTML5 Canvas and JavaScript. Experience nostalgic arcade action reimagined for modern web technologies!
backstory: This project brings the charm of classic 8-bit arcade games to the modern web. Leveraging HTML5 Canvas and vanilla JavaScript, it offers smooth gameplay, old-school sound effects, and handcrafted pixel art, all delivered seamlessly in your browser. Inspired by gaming nostalgia, it demonstrates how simple technology can still create magical, engaging experiences today.
